glamsterdam_devnet_scoping.highlight: ETH/70 and ETH/71 confirmed for Glamsterdam devnet-4; ETH/72 deferred to blob devnets pending spec freeze
Target gas limit field moving from EL flag to CL-supplied payload attribute (consensus-specs #5235, execution-apis #796); EL devs asked to review before Monday
Consensus-specs #5223 (withdrawability delay for builder deposits) and #5236 (bid validation against target gas limit) also required for devnet-4
Dual-deadline PRs (#5212, #5210) to be merged now with matching deadlines; reorg enforcement deferred until all clients implement

builder_deposits.highlight: Prysm benchmarks: 8,192 deposits batch-verified in ~800ms; worst-case (all invalid) ~6s; pre-processing cache proposed as fix
Gas limit to be capped at 190M for devnet-4 to avoid 8,193 overflow; 7688 (forward-compatible SSZ) planned for later devnet to lift cap
Client optimizations (not a new deposit contract) agreed as the path forward for builder deposit processing

ssz_engine_api.highlight: Two competing SSZ Engine API proposals: Barnabas (REST transport only, no naming changes) vs. Marius (full naming refactor); Nethermind has shipped Barnabas approach with 5-10x JSON speedup
Decision deferred to ACDE/ACDT; feature remains optional and not tied to a hard fork

hegota_eips.highlight: Sukun presented committee attestation broadcast spec (ethp2p #5): batching sigs, reducing gossip overhead, lowering mesh D to 4; targets 4x committee size increase enabling 8-slot epochs; proposed for Hegota
EIP-8025 (optional execution proofs / zkEVM) presented by EF zkEVM team; opt-in only, no consensus gating; Lighthouse and Prysm implementations exist; proposed for Hegota
Two EIPs not reached today (return deposits for distinct credentials; custom suite thresholds) deferred to next ACDC

action_items.action: EL devs review and approve execution-apis #796 (target gas limit in payload attributes) before Monday
Lighthouse to share deposit-processing benchmark branch (matching Prysm glamsterdam-devnet-3-deposits branch)
Review EIP-8025 and provide feedback; read updated EIP PR (#11604) not the stale merged version

decisions.decision: ETH/70 and ETH/71 included in Glamsterdam devnet-4; ETH/72 stays on blob devnets only
All gas-limit and dual-deadline spec changes (consensus-specs #5223, #5235, #5236, #5212, #5210) target Glamsterdam devnet-4
Builder deposit overflow fix: cap gas limit to 190M for devnet-4; rely on EIP-7688 in a later devnet to remove cap
Dual-deadline PRs to be merged today by Justin with same deadline values; no code changes required yet from other clients

targets.target: bal-devnet-7 launches Monday; Glamsterdam devnet-4 targets EOW (day or two after)
Glamsterdam alpha-8 spec release as soon as possible to enable devnet-4 targeting
